messages.content: I want the content to feel energetic, polished, and creator-led. Avoid purple gradients and generic stock footage.
I can remix the trend with a clean creator-led treatment and generate a few prompt options.
For my brand, keep captions concise and punchy. I like high-contrast product shots, real workflow screens, and witty founder voice.
This campaign can be more chaotic and meme-native, but that is only for the launch week.
The remix will preserve the durable brand voice while letting the launch creative move faster.
The second version is closer. More fast cuts, less corporate language, do not use fake testimonials.
